frontmatter_compliance.notes: HARD FAIL: description 1417 chars exceeds 1024 ceiling. Missing allowed-tools, requires_claude_code, composes_with

description_quality.notes: Weak action verb ('Use this skill'); 10+ trigger phrases; explains 2 workflows; strong content but length violation

progressive_disclosure.notes: 186 lines body at upper edge; 5 refs (1351 lines total) linked; some duplication body vs house-style.md; house-style.md 404 lines no TOC

instruction_clarity.notes: Imperative; clear A vs B workflow; cardinal rule callout; numbered steps + walk-throughs; anti-patterns explained

coordination.notes: No composes_with/spawned_by/owns declared in frontmatter; other skills can't discover composition signal

completeness.notes: All 5 refs exist and linked; evals/evals.json present (rare and excellent); but 'thariq's site' at line 164 lacks URL/context

anti_patterns.notes: Hardcoded 'thariq's site' pointer; pervasive 'Hive' examples throughout references

critical.fix: Delete final 'Output is always a pair...' sentence and 'Especially trigger when...' repetition

nits.item: Trigger restatement in description is redundant
evals/evals.json is great — promote as pattern

top_fixes.fix: Trim description from 1417 to ≤1024 chars (HARD FAIL fix)
Add standard frontmatter fields (allowed-tools, requires_claude_code, composes_with, metadata.category)
Add H2 TOC to house-style.md (404 lines exceeds 300-line threshold)
